message:
fix(mutex): use get_mut() instead of self in OwnedLockFuture::poll

Replace Pin<&mut Self> destructuring via mut self with explicit
self.get_mut() in OwnedLockFuture::poll. The previous pattern used
mut self which required re-pinning for field access. Using get_mut()
is the canonical pattern for Unpin futures and avoids subtle
pin-projection issues.

Also adds clarifying comments on the re-registration path: "Was
dequeued by unlock() but someone stole the lock."

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
